{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322023133DB17864A6913284D5F58"}"},"total":473},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7495351299995878168","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"无cp爽文，主角无敌，有系统，新世界生成规则混乱，主角就是新世界天道继承人，主要讲天道养成故事🤔，还不错，推荐推荐[笑]","text_exts":[{"e":18,"s":15,"text":"新世界","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%96%B0%E4%B8%96%E7%95%8C&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774117893284D5F58%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227495351299995878168%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227436321252123347993%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%96%B0%E4%B8%96%E7%95%8C%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745149868,"group_id":"7436321252123347993","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"工作已经很累了，就爱无脑爽文😊","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/nPYia/ebjg+lzk1V8+k2DEILBzc6+dpSjTGElcva1K","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/efe83bfa3a424f7f82d15be96a263399~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701714&x-signature=R%2FJdu5f8GVcSwHxvz798grGAkjM%3D","user_id":"1310220570343271","user_name":"小米粥ZS"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1310220570343271","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7436321252123347993","book_info":{"abstract":"【无CP+女强】
末世和高级丧尸同归于尽的阮浮影穿到一本古早狗血的校园甜宠文里。
既不是女主，也不是女配，只是一个连戏份都是别人口述的炮灰。
一穿来就直面修罗场，男主和恶毒女配分别让她站队，想她堂堂一个基地的领主，怎么可能将这些小屁孩放在眼中？
结果回家一看。
好消息，可以吃各种末世没有的食物。
坏消息，家里一贫如洗，什么都需要钱。
阮浮影果断选择站队恶毒女配。
你说男主更有性价比？
呵呵，他一个纯靠女人的小白脸，拿什么和我的大小姐比？
大小姐：今天那傻逼又来了，十万块，你去帮我打他一顿！
